WS25-T1.title: Gate the Google sign-in provider on env-presence, matching the existing X/Twitter pattern
WS25-T1.note: Spec: docs/auth-login-fix-plan.md §2 WS25-T1. Fixes the broken 'Continue with Google' button (client_id=undefined when AUTH_GOOGLE_ID/SECRET are unset) by gating it in apps/web/lib/auth-providers.ts and apps/web/auth.ts's buildProviders(), mirroring the X/Twitter gate already there.

WS25-T2.title: Duplicate the Resend email transport into apps/web/lib/email-transport.ts
WS25-T2.note: Spec: docs/auth-login-fix-plan.md §2 WS25-T2. Ports apps/worker/src/lib/email-transport.ts (EmailTransport/ResendEmailTransport/LoggingEmailTransport/defaultEmailTransport) into apps/web/lib/, swapping the logger import for apps/web/lib/logger.ts. Deliberately a duplication, not a packages/core extraction (see plan's Revision note for why) -- apps/worker's copy and tests are untouched.

WS25-T3.title: Wire real Resend delivery into auth.ts's sendVerificationRequest; remove the unconditional production throw
WS25-T3.note: Spec: docs/auth-login-fix-plan.md §2 WS25-T3. This is the fix for the reported bug: email sign-in ('Save' button on /claim) currently throws unconditionally in production, surfacing Auth.js's generic Configuration error page for every real user. Uses the WS25-T2 transport with a real magic-link template; retires apps/web/lib/magic-link-mailbox.ts (dead once this lands).

WS25-T4.title: Make a Resend send failure degrade gracefully instead of hitting Auth.js's generic Configuration error page
WS25-T4.note: Spec: docs/auth-login-fix-plan.md §2 WS25-T4. Defense in depth: even with real Resend wired, a send failure (bad key, Resend outage, missing EMAIL_FROM) must not crash into the raw error page. Empirically confirm (new test) the error shape Auth.js needs to redirect gracefully instead of re-trusting the existing unverified code comment about the rate-limit throw's behavior.

WS25-T5.title: Regression coverage for the full sign-in path (provider gating + transport selection + send success/failure)
WS25-T5.note: Spec: docs/auth-login-fix-plan.md §2 WS25-T5. First test in the repo to actually exercise the production email sign-in branch at all (today only the dev-mode stub path is tested, per golden-loop.spec.ts's own header comment on why it bypasses real sign-in). Also confirms apps/web/e2e/auth-provider-config.spec.ts stays green through T3/T4's edits.
